name: Maggie's Organics
description: Employee-owned, GOTS-certified brand making organic cotton basics and leggings in the USA and India since 1992.

products.name: Classic Crew Neck Tee
products.description: Everyday tee in 100% Regenerative Organic Certified cotton, GOTS certified.

products.name: Workwear Shirt
products.description: Long-sleeve button-up in 100% organic cotton French terry, garment-dyed and GOTS certified.

products.name: Organic Cotton Kimono
products.description: Relaxed kimono in organic cotton jersey with 10% spandex for stretch, made in India.

products.name: Base Layer Ankle Leggings
products.description: Everyday leggings in 90% organic cotton with 10% spandex for stretch, GOTS certified.
